ccSummaryPageVesselNotFound: Contact support on 0330 159 1989 to replace your Vessel name or PLN entries of 'Vessel not found (N/A)'.
ccSummaryPageOverridenByAdminNotificatio: Landings amended and authorised by service support cannot be changed.
Landings amended and authorised by service support cannot be changed but can be removed.
ccSummaryPageSystemError: There was an error in processing. Please resubmit. If the problem persists, contact support on 0330 159 1989.
commonSummaryPageMainHeader: Check your information before you create the catch certificate
commonTransportSummaryLeaveUKText: How will the export leave the UK?
ccSummaryPageWarning: You may be liable to investigation and enforcement action, including prosecution, if you knowingly submit false, misleading, or otherwise inaccurate data.
ccCreateCertificateIntro: By submitting this catch certificate, you confirm that:
ccCreateCertificateListOne: you understand that you are under a duty not to knowingly submit information that is false or otherwise inaccurate
ccCreateCertificateListTwo: the fisheries administrations may undertake checks on the accuracy and validity of the data, cross-reference it with data held and submitted by others in the supply chain, and exchange data with other relevant fisheries administrations, including those in the country of export
ccCreateCertificateListThree: you understand that you may be liable to investigation and potentially to enforcement action, including prosecution, if you knowingly submit false, misleading, or otherwise inaccurate data
